chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-466/2023 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 13.01.2025 Pir Riaz Muhammad Shah, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Jan Muhammad Khuro, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh................ Report filed by learned APG is taken on record. In view of Nasarullah’s case reported in PLD 2016 Sindh 238, I/O shall submit report before concerned magistrate and the magistrate shall ensure recovery of detenue. Needless to mention that this court in the cases wherein investigation is underway, cannot sit over the jurisdiction of the magistrate, under the supervisory jurisdiction, accordingly petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E IK
